message:
fix(widgets): improve scrollbar rendering and table cell handling

Scrollbar improvements:
- Fix edge case in thumb position calculation at boundary values
- Improve visual consistency with fractional content ratios

Table improvements:
- Fix off-by-one error in cell indexing that caused misalignment
- Improve handling of empty table cells

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
